title: Golden Globes 2026: Best Supporting Actress Predictions
text: Predicted Winner: Amy Madigan (Weapons). According to the article, Amy Madigan is the frontrunner for this category. The prediction notes that The Globes should further the miraculous ascent of Amy Madigan's performance as Gladys in Weapons, highlighting her momentum across multiple award ceremonies leading into the Golden Globes. Other Nominees: Ariana Grande (Wicked: For Good), Elle Fanning (Sentimental Value), Emily Blunt (The Smashing Machine), Inga Ibsdotter Lilleaas (Sentimental Value), Teyana Taylor (One Battle After Another). The article suggests that if an upset occurs, a win for Ariana Grande would be huge, as would a victory for Teyana Taylor, though Madigan's accumulated wins at earlier ceremonies make her the strong favorite.
